SQLLite.SQL: SELECT REF.RV_LOW_VALUE AS "Code" , REF.RV_MEANING AS "Description" , REF.RV_IIT_CODE_1 AS "JudgmentType" , REF.RV_IIT_CODE_2 AS "CJRNumber" FROM CCBC_REF_CODES REF WHERE REF.RV_DOMAIN = 'TRANS_REASON' ORDER BY REF.RV_LOW_VALUE

Security.roles: medium high wcSuper scSuper bmsSuper aeSuper dmSuper cpSuper ccbcMan ccbcUser ccbcSGB2
